meta.title: Aisyah Lawata Mosque — Islamic Center Al-Hunafa, Mataram
meta.description: Aisyah Islamic Center Al-Hunafa Lawata Mosque in Mataram — live prayer times, regular study circles, Quran classes, and a calm place of worship under Yayasan Al-Hunafa.

hero.tagline: Practising the Qur'an and Sunnah according to the understanding of the Companions of the Prophet.

prayer.title: Today's Prayer Times
prayer.subtitle: Calculated for Mataram (WITA) using the Indonesian Ministry of Religious Affairs (KEMENAG) method.
prayer.error: Unable to load prayer times right now.

about.title: About the Mosque
about.history: Built in 2001, Aisyah Lawata Mosque adapts Andalusian architecture, with an interior inspired by the great mosques of the Middle East. It was pioneered by three community figures — Abdurrahman Hijam, Kholid Bawazir, and Umar — and operates under Yayasan Al-Hunafa, a foundation devoted to two pillars: dakwah (Islamic outreach) and education.
about.design: The mosque has two floors: the ground floor for male congregants and the upper floor for female congregants, with separate staircases so the two never cross paths. It sits beside SMA Plus Abu Hurairah, the foundation's school.
about.vision: Practising the Qur'an and Sunnah according to the understanding of the Companions of the Prophet (the righteous predecessors).
about.mission: Spreading Islamic outreach (dakwah) as widely as possible.

activities.title: Activities & Programs
activities.subtitle: A living mosque with a strong study-circle culture.

kajianRutin.title: Regular Study Circles
kajianRutin.desc: Kajian rutin held most evenings after Maghrib, open to the public.

kajianKitab.title: Book Studies (Kajian Kitab)
kajianKitab.desc: Classical-text studies led by ustadz, including graduates of LIPIA and the Islamic University of Madinah, plus visiting foreign scholars.

quran.title: Quran Classes — Tahsin & Tahfizh
quran.desc: Recitation refinement and memorization classes for all levels.

jumat.title: Friday Prayer
jumat.desc: Sholat Jum'at draws a full congregation each week.

ramadhan.title: Ramadan Programs
ramadhan.desc: Tarawih, qiyamul lail, tadarus, and i'tikaf — the mosque is especially full.

schedule.title: Weekly Study Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Regular kajian throughout the week.
